text: The term machine learning can be understood as A field of study concerned with the design and development of algorithms and techniques that allow computers to learn..
deep learning: A form of machine learning based on the interpretation of the structure of data..
Unlike opposite, neural network implies A real or virtual computer system designed to emulate the brain in its ability to "learn" to assess imprecise data..
Neural net is similar to neural network, meaning A real or virtual computer system designed to emulate the brain in its ability to "learn" to assess imprecise data.
In the context of 人工智能, NLP is defined as NLP is an important concept..
What does computer vision mean? It means computer vision is an important concept..
reinforcement learning: reinforcement learning is an important concept..

What does transformer mean? It means (toys) A toy in the Transformers toyline which has mechanical parts that allow it to be altered in appearance from its original form as a humanoid robot action figure to another form, usually a vehicle, depending on the toy..
What does GAN mean? It means GAN is an important concept..
CNN: CNN is an important concept..
RNN: RNN is an important concept..
